_meta.note: Blockstream returns sat-denominated totals. funded - spent = current balance. 1 BTC = 1e8 sats. Real API: GET /address/<addr> + GET /address/<addr>/utxo.

_expected._note: Confirmed balance = (chain.funded - chain.spent) = 250000000 - 100000000 = 150000000 sats = 1.5 BTC. Mempool not included in confirmed quantity.
